title: Analytics - Device Release Notes Opened
scenario: Firebase analytics event "device_release_notes_opened" is logged when viewing device-specific release notes in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device to open Device Settings
Locate and tap on 'Release Notes' or similar option to view device-specific release notes
expected: The Firebase analytics event "device_release_notes_opened" is tracked with default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
